meaning: n.曲径,迷宫,迷津,迷惘,迷惑,糊涂vt.使迷惘,使混乱,迷失
examples: We got lost in the maze.
The building is a maze of corridors.
The maze is actually two interlocking spirals.
Further upriver, Marie leads the way in a thrilling scramble though a maze of overground caverns.
Naima gripped my hand tightly as we went deeper into the maze of neon-lit corridors.
